name: Xcede's Entra agent
description: A agent that allows helpdesk staff to provide level 2 support for Entra ID issues, such as resetting user MFA, adding users to groups, and looking up user information.

conversation_starters.title: Find the user by email
conversation_starters.text: Find the user by email and return their user ID. The email is abc@xyc.com.au

conversation_starters.title: Find the users groups
conversation_starters.text: Find the user by email and return their group memberships

conversation_starters.title: Add users to an application
conversation_starters.text: Add the user with id XXXX-XXX and add them to the payroll application
